titleStmt.title: SII 39.201: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 201. (A.R. No. 201 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of 1100 kuḻi of land for the purpose of extension of area and renovation of the sub-shrine, as well as food offerings, in the temple of Subrahmaṇyapiḷḷaiyār at Kaṭṭaṉūr by the Mahēśvarā who had assembled in the Gaṅgaikoṇḍāṉ maṇḍapa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Etadekāmmranāyasya gaṅgāgraha maṇḍape pālinan=tuṇḍapatinam śrī māheśvara śāsanam .
keṅkai koṇṭān tirumaṇṭapattu niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Irunta śrī rudraśrīmāheśvararom tiruppukkuḻiyil
porēṟṟiṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa kaṭṭaṉūril Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum cuppiramaṇṇiyap piḷḷaiyārkku tirukkoyil parappu po
tāmaiyāle Ikkoyilukkum tirumatiḷukkum nāṟpāṟ kellaikku Uḷḷu nūṟu kuḻi viṭavum Amutupaṭikku paḻantevatāṉa
m Uṭpaṭa Āyiram kuḻi nirnilattile ceraviṭak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi koṇṭu koyilukku pūcaiyum Amutu paṭiyum celu
ttavum Ippaṭiya Oḻiya vēṟoru putumai paṇṇak kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaraiyum celvatāka cilāle
kai paṇṇik kuṭuttom śrī māheśvarakṣai Ippaṭikku Aruḷāl camaiyamantiri Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
